meaning: n.猩红色,鲜红色布adj.猩红的,鲜红的,深红的
examples: The scarlet of the wings shades into pink at the tips.
He blushed scarlet at the thought.
It was once seen as a Scarlet Letter to have your movie go straight to DVD.
He is a classic throw-it-against-the-wall guy, slapping Virgin's scarlet logo on hundreds of products.
